Localization.Description: A user received information about current AppLocker policies which may indicate that they are preparing to bypass those policies

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user received information about current AppLocker policies on host {event_src.host} with "{alert.regex_match}"
A user received information about current AppLocker policies on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} received information about current AppLocker policies on host {event_src.host} with "{alert.regex_match}"
